programme.desc: After Ekstensive finished his 1969 MGC, John Cena comes to the shop with 1937 Bugatti Type 57 parts. Bill surprises John with a daring design choice.

programme.title: Garage Squad
programme.desc: The team is called in to rescue a 1969 Plymouth Road Runner. The owner has been too busy helping others to give the car the attention it needs.

programme.title: Garage Squad
programme.desc: A man sacrificed the engine of his 1965 Mercury Comet to help his wife out, and now she wants to return the favour by enlisting the team to restore the car to glory.

programme.title: Garage Squad
programme.desc: A son calls the team in to restore his mother's 1979 Triumph Spitfire that has sat in storage for 30 years after it was deemed impractical for the family.

programme.title: Shed And Buried

programme.desc: Are We Airbrushing This Car? Dave has a challenge restoring a 1964 Cadillac to its original condition while adding modern updates. Parts are scarce and the car needs a lot of work.

programme.desc: Henry Cole takes his trusty old 1940s Norton motorbike, Mavis, to the Welsh valleys. It may not be the quickest of bikes, but it allows him to enjoy the stunning scenery.

programme.desc: Henry Cole climbs aboard the brand-new Norton Domiracer to take on the A-Roads of East Anglia, where he grew up in. He visits the places he used to go as a youngster.

programme.title: World's Greatest Motorcycle Rides
programme.desc: Henry explores the highlands of Scotland on his brand-new Honda Africa Twin. He's on Tartan Titan route, starting at the old Cameron Hotel on the banks of Loch Lomond.

programme.desc: Marino takes his mates to see arguably the most successful Formula One car of all time - the Lotus 72. His drive in this iconic car turns out to be an emotional experience.

programme.title: Three Men Four Wheels

programme.desc: American Icon. A 1964 T-Bird needs pricey American parts to restore it to its former glory. And Ant gets a hand from his mate, Mike Brewer.

programme.desc: Ant hopes restoring and selling a 1980 Triumph Dolomite Sprint will help kickstart his farmhouse renovation. But will rust problems erode his profit.
